title: Chapter 78
content:
Chapter 78: Chapter 78: A Breakfast Served with Tension

The small, round wooden table in the center of the kitchen was far too cramped for three people—especially when two of them possessed such overwhelmingly generous figures.

Kai sat on one side, while Yun Xi sat next to him, their knees brushing under the table. Every time their legs touched, Yun Xi would let out a tiny, suppressed squeak, her inner thighs still incredibly sensitive and swollen from the brutal, glorious stretching he had given her the night before.

"Here we are!"

Xi Lan carried a steaming wooden tray over to the table. As she leaned forward to place the bowls of hot rice porridge and sweet steamed buns in front of them, the laws of gravity took full effect.

Because the table was low, Xi Lan had to bend deeply. The pale blue cotton gown she wore was already straining at the buttons, but as she leaned, the wide, loose neckline gaped open.

Kai didn’t even have to try to look; the view was presented to him on a silver platter.

Two massive, breathtakingly heavy globes of soft, pale flesh swung forward, threatening to spill completely out of the dress. The sheer volume of her breasts was mesmerizing. Kai could see the deep, shadowed valley of her cleavage, and thanks to the loose fabric, he caught a tantalizing glimpse of the dark pink edge of her areola—the very same one he had accidentally sucked the night before.

Damn,

Kai thought, his eyes glued to the swaying, motherly bounty.

Yun Xi really got all her assets from her mother. But as big as Yun Xi is... she is still no match for Xi Lan. This woman is on an entirely different level of ripe.

He remembered the taste of her salty-sweet skin, the way her soft, chubby waist had felt when he caught her. The

Strength 19 in his body hummed, a completely different kind of hunger waking up in his gut.

As Xi Lan set the last bowl down, she caught him staring. She didn’t catch exactly where he was looking, but she felt the intense, burning heat of his gaze.

She blinked, her sweet, round face flushing slightly. She took her seat directly across from him, the edge of the table pressing into her soft stomach, forcing her massive breasts to rest heavily right on the wood.

"Kai?" Xi Lan asked, tilting her head adorably. "Do you need something? Is there not enough sugar in the porridge?"

Kai, caught off guard but recovering with the smooth speed of his

Charisma 13

, offered a dazzling, charming smile.

"Umm, no... no, Aunty," Kai said, his voice a low, warm baritone. He picked up his chopsticks. "It’s just that... looking at this, the food is so delicious. You surely have magic in your hands, I have to say."

He maintained eye contact, completely unfazed, even as he thought about the other magical things those soft hands could do.

Xi Lan melted. She had spent years raising a daughter alone, dealing with the struggles of the commoner district. Compliments from handsome, strong young men were not something she was used to.

"Oh, Kai... you are just..."

She giggled, a beautifully flustered sound. She brought a palm up to cup her cheek, her elbow resting on the table. The movement pushed her left breast up, squeezing it tightly against her right, deepening her cleavage right in front of Kai’s face.

"I know it’s delicious," she beamed, her eyes crinkling. "After all, I pour all my love into it! And I certainly don’t want your mother to complain about the food if she hears I let you leave hungry. Haha!"

"Yeah, Aunty, you are absolutely right," Kai chuckled, taking a bite of the pork bun. It really was incredible. "My mom is a great cook, but this is giving her a run for her money."

Xi Lan preened under the praise. She picked up her own chopsticks and turned her maternal gaze toward her daughter.

"So, Yun Xi," Xi Lan smiled, blowing on her hot porridge. "I hope you and Kai studied well last night? Did you cover a lot of material?"

Yun Xi, who had been quietly nibbling on her food while remembering the feeling of Kai’s massive cock rearranging her insides, jumped in her seat.

"Ahh!" Yun Xi squeaked, nearly dropping her chopsticks. Her face turned the color of a ripe tomato. "Umm... yeah! Yeah, Mom! We... we studied very well! We went over... so many deep things."

She gulped, her thighs rubbing together nervously under the table.

"You know, Kai is... Kai is so smart. He taught me things I never even imagined."

Kai smirked behind his teacup.

Oh, I taught her alright. An intensive, hands-on anatomy course.

Xi Lan lowered her bowl, looking at her daughter with genuine confusion. Yun Xi was sweating, her breathing was shallow, and she kept squirming in her chair as if it were on fire.

"What happened, Yun Xi?" Xi Lan asked, leaning forward, maternal concern knitting her brow. "Why are you looking so weird, dear? Are you running a fever? Your face is completely red."

"I... um... it’s just..." Yun Xi fumbled, her brain short-circuiting. She couldn’t tell her mother that her pussy was currently weeping Kai’s seed into her fresh Academy panties. "It’s the porridge! It’s very hot!"

Xi Lan looked even more confused. "But you haven’t taken a bite yet, sweetheart."

Before Yun Xi could completely blow their cover, Kai stepped in.

"Ahh, it’s just that, Aunty," Kai said smoothly, reaching over to place a warm, reassuring hand over Yun Xi’s trembling fingers. "Yun Xi is actually just scared about the upcoming tests. She is putting a lot of pressure on herself about how she will perform. That’s it."

He gave Yun Xi’s hand a gentle squeeze, then looked deeply into her panicked eyes.

"You don’t have to think about it so much, Yun Xi," Kai said, his voice dropping to that dominant, intimate register she had grown addicted to last night. "I am with you. And I believe you will surely do perfectly. You take instruction very well."

Yun Xi let out a long, shaky exhale. She smiled, her heart fluttering at how effortlessly he protected her. "Th-thank you, Kai."

Xi Lan’s face softened instantly, the confusion washing away. She clapped her hands together, her heavy breasts jiggling delightfully.

"Oh, Kai! You are such a good friend!" Xi Lan gushed, looking at him with absolute adoration. "I am so happy that Yun Xi has a friend like you. Because she is always so alone, buried in her books... but now I don’t have to worry about her. You really take care of her."

"It’s okay, Aunty," Kai smiled, releasing Yun Xi’s hand to finish his tea. He set the cup down and shifted his gaze entirely back to the mother.

He leaned forward, resting his forearms on the table, invading Xi Lan’s space just a fraction.

"And you also, Aunty," Kai murmured, his dark eyes locking onto hers. "If you ever have any heavy work... or if you need help around the house, you can call me anytime. It’s hard to do everything alone."

He let his gaze drop deliberately to her heaving chest, then slowly back up to her lips.

"And besides," Kai added, his voice dropping to a seductive whisper. "Beautiful women should not do so much manual labor. It’s a waste."

Xi Lan gasped.

The air left her lungs. Her eyes widened, and a blush so fierce it rivaled her daughter’s exploded across her cheeks, traveling all the way down her neck and disappearing into the valley of her cleavage.

"Oh... my..."

She stammered, completely disarmed. She tried to sit back, but her chest heaved with a sudden, erratic breath, revealing even more of her huge, pale breasts as the fabric of the blue dress strained to its absolute limit. One of the buttons near her collarbone looked ready to pop.

"Yeah... you..." Xi Lan swallowed hard, her sweet face burning with a mix of shock and undeniable, forbidden flattery. "You are right. Sure... I will, Kai. Thank you."

The tension at the table was thick enough to cut with a sword. Yun Xi sat there, blissfully unaware of the flirtation, just happy the attention was off her.

After a few more minutes of quiet eating, the bowls were cleared.

Kai stood up, his

Agility 10 making his movements sleek and graceful. He grabbed his Academy bag.

"Well, Aunty, the food was incredible, but I really have to go to my home now," Kai announced, stretching his broad shoulders. "Thank you so much for everything. My mom must be waiting for me."

"Of course, Kai," Xi Lan stood up quickly to see him out, her legs feeling strangely wobbly. "Have a safe trip back. And... please come again."

"Oh, don’t worry, Aunty," Kai smirked, looking back and forth between the ruined daughter and the flustered, voluptuous mother. "I’ll definitely be coming back."
